judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the top score from the given table. The result column shows the scores for each game. Looking at the results:
- September 24: 54–0 (Alabama scored 54 points)
- October 2: 19–7 (Alabama scored 19 points)
- October 9: 26–7 (Alabama scored 26 points)
- October 16: 21–0 (Alabama scored 21 points)
- October 23: 2–0 (Alabama scored 2 points)
- October 30: 24–0 (Alabama scored 24 points)
- November 6: 14–0 (Alabama scored 14 points)
- November 13: 49–0 (Alabama scored 49 points)
- November 25: 33–6 (Alabama scored 33 points)
- January 1, 1927: 7–7 (Alabama scored 7 points)
The highest score Alabama achieved in any of these games was 54 points against Millsaps.
